name: Spoon River Rolled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the vegetable shortening and sugar together at medium speed until well blended.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, lemon extract, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix until creamy, scraping down the bowl before and after adding each ingredient.
3. Stir in sour cream to combine.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
5. Return dough to room temperature.
6. Roll out on a lightly floured board to about 1/4 inch thick.
7. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch round cutter or an equivalent (see Note below).
8. Place the cut cookies onto cookie sheets sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
9. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
Note: Nutritive values are based on using a 2 1/2-inch round cutter and cookies weighing just over 1 ounce each. Using other cutters should maintain the same cookie weight. Adding different flavorings will alter nutritional values.
